# infisical_secret_metadata (Data Source)

Retrieve properties for a single Infisical secret without exposing the secret value.

## Example Usage

```terraform
terraform {
  required_providers {
    infisical = {
      # version = <latest version>
      source = "infisical/infisical"
    }
  }
}

provider "infisical" {
  host = "https://app.infisical.com" # Only required if using self hosted instance of Infisical, default is https://app.infisical.com
  auth = {
    universal = {
      client_id     = "<machine-identity-client-id>"
      client_secret = "<machine-identity-client-secret>"
    }
  }
}

data "infisical_secret_metadata" "example" {
  name             = "MY_SECRET"
  environment_slug = "<environment-slug>"
  project_id       = "<project-id>"
  folder_path      = "<folder-path>"
}

output "secret_version" {
  value = data.infisical_secret_metadata.example.secret_version
}

output "secret_type" {
  value = data.infisical_secret_metadata.example.secret_type
}

output "tags" {
  value = data.infisical_secret_metadata.example.tags
}

output "secret_metadata" {
  value = data.infisical_secret_metadata.example.secret_metadata
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `environment_slug` (String) The environment slug where the secret resides.
- `folder_path` (String) The path to the folder where the secret is located.
- `name` (String) The name of the secret to retrieve properties for.
- `project_id` (String) The Infisical project ID.

### Optional

- `secret_type` (String) The type of the secret (shared or personal). Defaults to shared.

### Read-Only

- `secret_metadata` (List of Object) Metadata associated with the secret as a list of key-value entries. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--secret_metadata))
- `secret_version` (Number) The version number of the secret.
- `tags` (List of Object) Tags associated with the secret. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--tags))

<a id="nestedatt--secret_metadata"></a>
### Nested Schema for `secret_metadata`

Read-Only:

- `is_encrypted` (Boolean)
- `key` (String)
- `value` (String)


<a id="nestedatt--tags"></a>
### Nested Schema for `tags`

Read-Only:

- `color` (String)
- `id` (String)
- `name` (String)
- `slug` (String)
